title: Card Game Localization / Product Development Executive (Jap to English) #OPK
description:
Job Summary

Our Client is a leading Japanese entertainment company, producer of collectible card games and trading cards. They are looking for a Card Game Localization / Product Development Executive to join their team.

Responsibilities

  • Lead scheduling and oversee the development and production of collectible card game products to ensure timely delivery and quality standards
  • Collaborate effectively with Japanese companies to coordinate development and production activities, ensuring alignment with project goals (80% of role)
  • Translate and localize card game products from Japanese to English, maintaining accuracy and cultural relevance (20% of role)
  • Proofread localized text and product designs to ensure linguistic accuracy and consistency with brand standards
  • Manage multiple tasks and schedules efficiently to meet project deadlines and support company events
  • Apply knowledge of games or anime to enhance localization quality and product relevance
  • Demonstrate meticulous attention to detail to identify and resolve linguistic and cultural nuances in localization
  • Communicate clearly and professionally in both written and oral English and Japanese to liaise with Japanese-speaking associates daily
  • Support company events by working on some weekends or public holidays as required
  • Travel overseas for business trips when necessary to support development and production activities

Required competencies and certifications

  • Diploma in any field
  • Minimum JLPT N3 competency in Japanese to enable effective communication with Japanese partners

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • At least 1 year of relevant experience in localization or product development within the gaming or entertainment industry
  • Knowledge of games or anime to support product localization and development

Sarah (R2198293)

Talents@Work Pte Ltd (21C0501)

*We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified. Thank you
